category_sources: source_facts.description says POCO is C++ class libraries for network and internet-based applications.
display_name_sources: Official pocoproject.org pages and docs brand the project as POCO C++ Libraries.
docs_sources: Official POCO documentation is hosted on docs.pocoproject.org/current/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official pocoproject.org About/GitHub references and the GitHub repository identify pocoproject/poco as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official POCO repository topics describe C++ libraries for networking, HTTP, and cross-platform applications.
